title: Child Workflow: Compliance - Collect Configs
description: Retrieves running configurations from all devices in the target group. Flags unreachable devices without marking them compliant. Runs as a child job from the orchestrator.

device_group.description: IAP ConfigurationManager device group to use as audit scope

configs.description: Map of device_name to raw running config text. Only reachable devices are included.

unreachable_devices.description: Device names that returned an error or timeout during getDeviceConfig

device_count.description: Total number of devices in the group (reachable + unreachable)

taskStatus.description: success even if some devices are unreachable — partial collection is not a failure

internal_steps: 2. childJob loop (parallel) — one child per device calling getDeviceConfig
3. Collect results — build configs map, separate unreachable into array
